# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
LIV_crusader_forts = {
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = LIV  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla

	age = age_1_traditions
	requires = castle_advance
	
	fort_limit_modifier = 0.20
}

LIV_a_order_knights = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = LIV  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	
	requires = LIV_crusader_forts
}

	age = age_2_renaissance
	
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = LIV  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	
	requires = professional_armies_advance
}

	age = age_2_renaissance
	requires = standardized_coins
	icon = baltic_shipyard
	global_lumber_output_modifier = 0.1
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = LVA  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
}
